pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Jakarta EE API version to 10.0.0 to support Java 21 and modern enterprise features.
Update Payara server version to 6.2024.2 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade MicroProfile version to 6.1 to align with the newer Jakarta EE and Java 21 stack.
Update SLF4J logging facade to version 2.0.11 for security and compatibility.
Introduce explicit Log4j 2.22.1 dependency for logging implementation.
Upgrade JUnit 5 testing framework to version 5.10.1.
Add AssertJ 3.24.2 as a testing assertion library.
Update RestAssured HTTP testing library to version 5.4.0.
Add Jackson BOM 2.15.3 for JSON processing in system tests.
Update CloudTrain common REST dependency to version 1.2.0.
Update CloudTrain common persistence JPA dependency to version 1.2.0.
Update CloudTrain common observability dependency to version 1.2.0.
Update CloudTrain common test core dependency to version 1.2.0.
Define multi-architecture Docker build platforms (amd64 and arm64).
Change Kubernetes cluster namespace from default to cloudtrain.
Update Kubernetes ingress host to a specific development domain.
Update Maven Clean Plugin to version 3.3.2.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin to version 3.11.0 to support Java 21 compilation.
Update Maven Dependency Plugin to version 3.6.1.
Update Maven Deploy Plugin to version 3.1.1.
Update Maven Docker Plugin to version 0.43.4.
Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to version 3.4.1.
Update Maven Failsafe Plugin to version 3.2.1.
Update Maven Flatten Plugin to version 1.5.0.
Update Maven Install Plugin to version 3.1.1.
Add Maven JaCoCo Plugin version 0.8.11 for code coverage.
Update Maven JAR Plugin to version 3.3.0.
Add Maven OWASP Dependency Check Plugin version 9.0.7 for security scanning.
Update Maven Resources Plugin to version 3.3.1.
Update Maven Site Plugin to version 3.12.1.
Update Maven Sonar Plugin to version 3.10.0.2594.
Update Maven Source Plugin to version 3.3.0.
Update Maven Surefire Plugin to version 3.2.1.
Update Maven WAR Plugin to version 3.4.0.
Update Maven Compose Plugin to version 5.1.0.
Update Maven Helm Plugin to version 5.0.0.
Import Jackson BOM into dependency management to manage JSON library versions.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrote README to provide comprehensive documentation on MicroProfile JWT Auth integration, configuration, and usage.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced brief description with detailed sections on Synopsis, configuration parameters, and code examples.

README.md.general_idea: Documented the supported multi-architecture Docker image platforms.
README.md.human_impl: Added list of supported platforms: linux/amd64 and linux/arm64/v8.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the build status badge to link to the AWS CodeBuild project.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced empty badge image with AWS CodeBuild badge URL.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions for pulling the Docker image and Helm chart from the registry.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Docker Pull Command' and 'Helm Pull Command' sections with specific URLs.

README.md.general_idea: Refined local build instructions and clarified the build output.
README.md.human_impl: Renamed section to 'HOW-TO build this application locally' and updated result description to generic 'showcase application'.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions for running and stopping the showcase locally using Docker Compose.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO start and stop this showcase locally' section with docker compose up/down commands.

README.md.general_idea: Added a section demonstrating how to interact with the application via API requests.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO demo this showcase' section with endpoint URLs and example JSON response.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 Alpine variant to a JRE 21 Alpine variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace default garbage collection settings with ZGC and generational ZGC flags, which are optimized for Java 21.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM argument to ensure consistent character handling.

src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Docker Compose specifications.
Update header comment to remove specific 'Java EE' reference, making it more generic.
src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.human_impl: Changed 'runnable Java EE application' to 'runnable application'
